_meta.description: Generic cross-language term pairs. These are domain-agnostic concepts common across ALL technical fields (model/模型, algorithm/算法, ...), NOT any specific domain's jargon. Scholar-agent is domain-agnostic open source, so the shipped dictionary intentionally carries only universal terms. Add your own domain terms via `scholar-agent synonyms add` or ~/.scholar/synonyms.json.
_meta.format: Each group has a canonical phrase and aliases. At query time, if any phrase appears as a substring of the query, all phrases in the group are appended as additional queries and blended into the ranking (original query dominant + normalized expansion boost). Cross-language retrieval of domain-specific terms relies on the embedding layer; this dictionary only bridges generic concepts.
